result.api_response: POST /rest/sse/perplexity_ask sent. Multiple ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED and ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR errors in console for perplexity.ai API endpoints. 19 requests total.
result.console_error: net::ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on /rest/rate-limit/free-queries, /rest/event/analytics (x5), /rest/collections/list_user_collections. net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on /rest/event/analytics. All background API calls fail.
result.input_method: clipboard_paste + JS click (submit button unresponsive to direct clicks)

notes: Perplexity APF warning test: BLOCKED but NO visible warning. APF appears to be disrupting the H2 connection entirely — not just the perplexity_ask SSE request, but ALL API calls to perplexity.ai fail with ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED. The submit button was unresponsive to both click and Enter — required JS document.querySelector().click() to trigger. After submission, the perplexity_ask request was sent but the page shows no response and no warning. The site remains stuck on the input screen. The APF block is too aggressive — it kills the entire connection rather than injecting a warning into the SSE stream. The perplexity_sse envelope template may not be functioning correctly, or the H2 proxy is closing the connection before the warning can be delivered.
